g.title: acq.fund_allocation:funding_source->acq.funding_source:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (funding_source) REFERENCES acq.funding_source(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.fund_allocation:fund->acq.fund:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (fund) REFERENCES acq.fund(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.fund_allocation:allocator->actor.usr:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (allocator) REFERENCES actor.usr(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
